title: Selling Lies (feat. Ilho Cho)
description: Mid-paced Heavy Metal song featuring Ilho Cho's vocals.

title: Victories (feat. Insane Divinity)
description: Epic Melodic Death Metal featuring Insane Divinity's vocals.

title: Deep Waves (feat. Nyx Peccatum)
description: Melodic Metal featuring beautiful female vocals by Ukrainian singer Nyx Peccatum.

title: Flight Call (feat. Rhinefer)
description: Mid-tempo doom metal ballad featuring female vocals by Rhinefer.

title: Hell Brawl
description: The horned beasts are dishing it out against each other - again!

title: Hammer of Hope
description: Fast and melodic power metal with a nice and trippy bridge, ready for receiving vocals!

title: Brook Over Black Rocks
description: A merry stream flows over black rocks from hell.

title: Blood Crown
description: Powerful up-tempo track, featuring doom metal, heavy metal and black metal elements.

title: Serenadem
description: A beautiful, melodic, and beautiful ending to the song.
